name: get_export_status
description: Checks the status of an export previously started with export_gamma, using its exportId. Only use this tool if the user explicitly asks for the export status — the interactive widget rendered by export_gamma already polls for completion and shows the download link automatically when done. Do not poll in a loop. Returns "completed" with a download URL, "failed" with an error, or "pending" if it is still rendering. The download URL expires after about one week and is not tied to the API key, so share it carefully and download promptly.

exportId.description: The export ID to check status for (returned by export_gamma).
